entry.title: New BPA SAQMMA17A0120 awarded to THE MIL CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
NEW BLANKET PURCHASE AGREEMENT FOR SYSTEM ANALYSIS, IMPLEMENTATION & SUPPORT SERVICES (SAISS) ISSUED AGAINST GSA FSS 70 CONTRACT GS-35F-443GA TO SUPPORT THE U.S. DEPARTMENT OF STATE. REFERENCE RFQ SAQMMA16Q0210.
IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:solicitationProcedures.description: SUBJECT TO MULTIPLE AWARD FAIR OPPORTUNITY
